heroHeadline: Spotify's 20th Anniversary Confirms Bad Bunny #2 All-Time Most-Streamed Artist; "Tracking Bad Bunny" Wins Webby Award for Best Fan Engagement
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance, and Grammy Album of the Year. Spotify's 20th anniversary rankings (Apr 23) confirmed Bad Bunny #2 all-time most-streamed artist globally behind Taylor Swift, with Un Verano Sin Ti the most-streamed album in Spotify history (22B+ streams). The interactive "Tracking Bad Bunny" DDB Latina Puerto Rico campaign won the Webby Award for Best Fan Engagement at the 30th Annual Webby Awards (announced Apr 21). European leg of the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour opens May 22 in Barcelona — 10 Madrid nights to follow. Spotify monthly listeners: 103.9M.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, Pollstar, Bloomberg, NPR, Remezcla, SoleRetriever, Deadline, Variety, CNN, and major media
